name: Hypertension Treatment Escalation with Loop-Back and Dosage Guards
input: Create a flowchart for hypertension treatment escalation. Start: Diagnose hypertension (BP >= 140/90 on 3 occasions). Step 1: Start ACE inhibitor (Lisinopril 10mg). Wait 4 weeks. Decision: BP at goal (<130/80)? If Yes -> Continue current therapy, annual follow-up. If No -> Increase ACE inhibitor to max dose (40mg). Wait 4 weeks. Decision: BP at goal? If Yes -> Continue, annual follow-up. If No -> Add thiazide diuretic (HCTZ 25mg). Wait 4 weeks. Decision: BP at goal? If Yes -> Continue dual therapy. If No -> Decision: Side effects present? If Yes -> Switch to ARB (Losartan). If No -> Add calcium channel blocker (Amlodipine 5mg) for triple therapy. Final check: If still not at goal after triple therapy -> Refer to hypertension specialist. Show the escalation steps clearly with loop-back decisions at each stage.
qualityCriteria: Flowchart type declared with TD direction
At least 3 BP goal decision diamonds
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Flowchart TD with 15+ nodes, stepwise treatment escalation, 3+ decision diamonds, side effect branching, specialist referral.
